sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78762" key="paraskeuasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρασκευ-αστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n78762.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">provider</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιθυμιῶν</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg023:518c" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">518c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
